data.title: PEPE down 40% in a month, now $0.00 with a 1.9% daily drop. Market selloff linked to Bitcoin's slide under $65,000.
data.description: The cryptocurrency PEPE is currently trading at $0.00, experiencing a 1.9% daily decrease. This decline is part of a larger 40% drop over the past month, driven by Bitcoin's fall below $65,000 and reduced investor trust in alternative digital currencies.

data.description: In the upcoming weeks, the creator of a prominent Chinese crypto platform is set to unveil a trust, supported by advocates of Ether.

data.title: Prospera's annual event in Orlando celebrates small business growth with various stakeholders in attendance, including OUC as the presenter, at the Science Center on Oct. 17, 2025.
data.description: In the bustling city of Orlando, Florida, on October 17, 2025, the yearly entrepreneurship celebration hosted by Prospera took place at the Orlando Science Center. The event, sponsored by OUC, brought together a diverse group of leaders, entrepreneurs, and partners to showcase inspiring local success stories and advancements. This gathering served as a platform for collaboration and networking, emphasizing the importance of supporting and fostering entrepreneurship in the community. The event saw participation from a significant number of attendees, with a range of speakers and workshops providing valuable insights and opportunities for growth.

data.title: ArrowMark Financial Corp. disclosed September's estimated Net Asset Value as $22.40, on Oct. 17, 2025.
data.description: ArrowMark Financial Corp. (NASDAQ: BANX) revealed on October 17, 2025, that the estimated unaudited Net Asset Value (NAV) of BANX as of September 30, 2025, stood at $22.40.

data.title: Nabors Energy Transition Corp. II extends outside date from Oct. 18 to Nov. 18, 2025.
data.description: On October 17, 2025, Nabors Energy Transition Corp. II (Nasdaq: NETD) disclosed that their board of directors decided to extend the outside date from October 18 to November 18, 2025. This extension, allowed under the company's regulations, gives NETD more time to complete certain activities.

data.title: ALGO tests $0.18 amid Bitcoin drop; crypto market down 5% weekly. ALGO faces key support levels, uncertain signals.
data.description: Following a 5% weekly decline in Bitcoin, Algorand is currently trading at $0.18. This drop has put pressure on alternative cryptocurrencies, with the ALGO price now testing crucial technical support levels. The overall ecosystem signals are mixed, indicating uncertainty in the market.

data.title: INJ price hovers around $8.41 at support, hits record transaction milestone amid Bitcoin reaching $110K. Market gains momentum.
data.description: The price of Injective is currently trading at $8.41, hovering close to a key technical support level following a significant achievement of reaching a record number of transactions. This milestone comes amidst a surge in market activity driven by Bitcoin breaking the $110,000 mark, which has created positive momentum for overall market recovery.

data.title: UniFirst Corp shifting reporting structure, impacting financial segments starting Q4 ended Aug 30, 2025.
data.description: In Wilmington, Massachusetts on October 17, 2025, UniFirst Corporation announced changes to its reporting organization starting from the fourth quarter and year ended August 30, 2025. This restructuring will lead to modifications in the Company's financial operations and reportable segments.

data.title: Inception Fertility praises Trump for urging US employers to include IVF in health benefits. Largest fertility provider in North America supports proposal.
data.description: During a recent press briefing, the President urged American employers to enhance healthcare benefits by incorporating In Vitro Fertilization (IVF) coverage. In a statement on Oct. 17, 2025, Inception Fertility, recognized as the leading fertility service provider in North America, expressed support for the policy initiative put forth by the administration. This move underscores the importance of expanding healthcare services to encompass IVF treatment options.

data.title: CRV price at $0.52 as US sets up Bitcoin reserve, boosting crypto sentiment but technicals advise caution.
data.description: Curve (CRV) is currently being traded at a price of $0.52 in the cryptocurrency market. This price surge is attributed to an overall positive sentiment in the market post the US government's creation of a Strategic Bitcoin Reserve. However, analysts are advising caution despite this optimism due to technical indicators.

data.title: Iovance Biotherapeutics granted 62,790 shares of stock options to 9 new employees on Oct 16, 2025.
data.description: On October 16, 2025, Iovance Biotherapeutics, located in San Carlos, California, disclosed the approval of granting inducement stock options to nine new non-executive employees. These stock options cover a total of 62,790 shares of the company's common stock. Iovance Biotherapeutics, a biotechnology firm specializing in developing innovative polyclonal tumor infiltrating lymphocyte (“TIL”) therapies for cancer patients, operates under the NASDAQ symbol IOVA.

data.title: FlexShopper, Inc. received a delisting notification from Nasdaq due to not filing necessary reports by the deadline.
data.description: FlexShopper, Inc. announced on Oct. 17, 2025, that it received a notice from Nasdaq on Oct. 14, 2025, about initiating the delisting process for its common stock (Nasdaq: FPAY). Nasdaq's Listing Qualifications Department stated that the delisting is due to FlexShopper's failure to file its Annual Report on Form 10-K for the period ended Dec. 31, 2024, and its Quarterly Reports on Form 10-Q for the periods ended March 31, 2025, and June 30, 2025, by the final deadline of Oct. 13, 2025, as required by Nasdaq Listing Rule 5250(c)(1).
